title: Profile
subtitle: Manage your personal details and the account type you use in FiNext.
tax_hint: These fields are only required when the account is self-employed.
username_locked_hint: The username cannot be changed from the profile.
email_locked_hint: The email cannot be changed from the profile.
phone_hint: You can use an international prefix, spaces or hyphens.
delete_account_hint: This action will permanently delete your user and all associated data.
delete_account_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
delete_account_success: Your account has been deleted successfully.

validation.full_name_min: Full name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.phone_format: The phone number cannot have that format.
validation.birth_date_future: Birth date cannot be in the future.
validation.irpf_range: Income tax must be between 0 and 60.
validation.company_min: Company must be at least 2 characters.
